# SolarPicks ☀️

Expert reviews and buying guides for portable solar panels, solar generators, and off-grid power solutions.

## Tech Stack

- [11ty (Eleventy)](https://www.11ty.dev/) - Static site generator
- [GitHub Pages](https://pages.github.com/) - Hosting
- GitHub Actions - Auto-deploy on push

## Local Development

```bash
npm install
npx @11ty/eleventy --serve
```

## Auto-Generated Content

This site uses automated content generation. New articles are added regularly via CI/CD pipeline.
